summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GlobalAgri corporate website with major homepage redesign. All backend APIs working (16/16 tests passed). Homepage features including numbered carousel, animated stats, value chain, section cards, and CTA band all functional. Navigation and forms integration working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Some job detail URLs show 'Job not found' when accessed directly
minor_issues.workaround: Job listings are visible on careers page, but individual job detail routing needs fixing

minor_issues.issue: Partner data loads from backend but visibility could be improved

passed_tests: Homepage hero carousel with numbered dots (01, 02, 03) and 'Discover Us' CTA
Homepage animated stats section with 4 counters ($250M+, 500K+, 25+, 25+)
Homepage value chain section with 4 steps (Origination, Risk, Logistics, Distribution)
Homepage section cards clickable and link to correct pages
Homepage CTA band with working 'Contact Our Team' and 'Browse Commodities' buttons
All navigation links: About tabs, Commodities tabs, Partners, Insights, Careers, Contact
Contact form submission (POST /api/contact) with success confirmation
Insights page loads articles from backend API
Partners page loads partner data from backend
About Key Facts tab shows stat cards
All 16 backend API endpoints working correctly
Form validation and error handling working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor routing issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix job detail page routing issue - some job URLs return 'Job not found'. Check job slug generation and routing in JobDetailPage component.
